opportunities.description: Summary: The Electrical Technician plays a critical role in ensuring the reliable operation, safe installation, and efficient maintenance of industrial electrical systems and machinery at client sites. This position requires a technically proficient professional with hands-on experience in electrical maintenance, troubleshooting, and equipment commissioning. The ideal candidate will contribute to operational excellence by delivering high-quality technical service, maintaining strict safety standards, and building strong client relationships through responsive support and clear communication.
